# Stock picking filter lot

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:1c0a2deb3960477ad9fc1c622f46ea36a2e033759f476949e337adb8f4cd86f6
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of stock: in a picking out or a scrap the user
can only select the lots available in the origin location.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module:

1. Go to an open picking or a scrap with products that are tracked by lots.
2. When you enter detailed operations you will notice that the lots available
   to select are filtered by the origin of the operation.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-workflow/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
